item.title: 2026 World Cup rosters: Predicting starting XIs for Spain, USA, France, more
item.description: With under 100 days to go until the 2026 World Cup, how do all the major contenders -- and the three co-hosts -- look in terms of rosters and starters...

item.title: World Cup Power Rankings: Who are the faves with 100 days to go?
item.description: Did your national team make the cut? And who do we think will challenge hardest?

item.title: Big combine shakeups in the top 64? Reid projects Rounds 1-2 with his new NFL mock draft
item.description: Now that the 2026 combine is in the books, how could the draft shake out? Jordan Reid projects the first two rounds -- including two trades.

item.title: Ranking the top 100 free agents: Which players should land big contracts?
item.description: Could Kenneth Walker III and Malik Willis get a lot of interest from teams? Let's stack the best free agents.

item.title: Ready for NFL free agency? We have the latest buzz on active teams, player-team fits and more
item.description: Here's what you need to know about 2026 free agency. We picked out everything from players who might break the bank to sleepers to watch.
